channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年7月17日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Kimi K3 is now live #2 OnePlus halts operations in USA and Europe #3 Goes-19 weather satellite enters Safe Hold mode #4 Let's Build PlanetScale from Scratch: Infrastructure #5 How Our Rust-to-Zig Rewrite Is Going #6 Sony Deletes a Bunch More Movies from the Accounts of People Who 'Bought' Them #7 Ente – Opening Our Books #8 Where are YC founders now? OpenAI and Anthropic, mostly #9 The lost joy of music piracy #10 Show HN: I've built a words game based on binary search

item.title: 2026年7月17日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence #2 My car's OTA update broke Android Auto, and it's a indictment of modern software #3 LM Studio Bionic: the AI agent for open models #4 Microsoft Comic Chat is now open source #5 FIFA World Cup 2026 Data Portraits #6 Decoy Font #7 Mathematics of Data Science #8 NotebookLM is now Gemini Notebook #9 Helium escaping from atmosphere of nearby rocky exoplanet in a habitable zone #10 Ring-Zero: Scaling Zero RL to a Trillion Parameters for Emergent Reasoning

item.title: 2026年7月16日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Sleep regularity is a stronger predictor of mortality risk than sleep duration (2023) #2 Mysteries of Telegram Data Centers #3 Prioritize mental health, and why communication is so important #4 The well-calibrated Bayesian [pdf] (1982) #5 Briar Is in Maintenance Mode #6 SpaceX bond worth 10% less than issue price – heading for junk bond status #7 Jurassic Park computers in excruciating detail #8 Towards a Harness That Can Do Anything #9 The Three-Second Theft: Why AI Voice Fraud Outruns Every Defence #10 OpenAI loses trademark dispute at EU court

item.title: 2026年7月16日（12:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Guerrilla London Bus Ads Mock Kylie Jenner's Meta Glasses Campaign #2 If you want to create a button from scratch, you must first create the universe #3 Inkling: Our Open-Weights Model #4 SQLite should have (Rust-style) editions #5 Making 768 servers look like 1 #6 Grok Build is open source #7 Bluesky Trademarks ATProto #8 Can LLMs Perform Deep Technical Comprehension of Computer Architecture Papers #9 G# – A modern .NET language with Go, Kotlin, and Swift ergonomics #10 Governments, companies, nonprofits should invest in free, open source AI [pdf]

item.description: #1 The art and engineering of Sega CD Silpheed #2 Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API, benchmarked against Whisper and its predecessor #3 A voxel Tokyo in real Japan time – ride the Yamanote line and study Japanese #4 Grok uploaded my user directory to xAI's servers #5 LAPD lets contract with surveillance giant Flock expire #6 DOGE is done. What happened to its records? #7 Precursor #8 Show HN: DOM-docx – HTML to native, editable Word docs (MIT) #9 Grok CLI uploaded the whole home directory to GCS #10 The 'absolute magic' of Morse code that still connects people globally
